faqs.question: How often should I schedule mosquito control treatments in Teaneck?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection throughout mosquito season in Teaneck (typically April through October), we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks. Our recurring service plans maintain a protective barrier around your property, significantly reducing mosquito populations even during peak summer months when Bergen County sees the highest activity levels.

faqs.question: Are your mosquito control treatments safe for my family and pets in Teaneck?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products specifically designed for residential use that are safe for children and pets once dried. Our technicians apply treatments strategically to vegetation and potential breeding sites, and we always provide clear instructions on any minimal wait times before re-entering treated areas.
